name: GPU Particle System - Explosion
description: 5000-particle spherical explosion burst with 3D physics: random velocity vectors, gravity, drag, per-particle lifetime and color transition from white-hot core through yellow, cyan and blue sparks to dark embers.

GPUExplosion.description: 250 particles simulating 3D spherical explosion. Seeded random angles (phi+theta for sphere surface), varying speeds, ballistic physics with gravity and exponential drag, per-particle color palette cycling through whiteâ†’yellowâ†’cyanâ†’blue.
GPUExplosion.code: function(props){var f=props.frame,W=props.layerSize.width,H=props.layerSize.height,cx=W/2,cy=H/2,t=f/30,N=250,elems=[],PI=Math.PI;function h(n){var v=Math.sin(n*127.1+37.4)*43758.5;return v-Math.floor(v);}for(var i=0;i<N;i++){var s=i*6.17,phi=Math.acos(1-2*h(s)),theta=h(s+1)*PI*2,spd=(h(s+2)*0.7+0.3)*650,life=h(s+3)*2.5+1,sz=h(s+4)*8+3,del=h(s+5)*0.15;var age=t-del;if(age<0||age>life)continue;var p=age/life,drag=Math.exp(-age*0.9);var vx=Math.sin(phi)*Math.cos(theta)*spd,vy=Math.sin(phi)*Math.sin(theta)*spd,vz=Math.cos(phi)*spd;var grav=280;var x3=vx*age*drag,y3=vy*age*drag-0.5*grav*age*age,z3=vz*age*drag;var persp=15/(15+z3*0.6);var x=cx+x3*persp,y=cy-y3*persp;var rv,gc,bv;if(p<0.12){rv=255;gc=255;bv=255;}else if(p<0.3){var q=(p-0.12)/0.18;rv=255;gc=Math.round(255*(1-q*0.2));bv=Math.round(255*(1-q));}else if(p<0.55){var q=(p-0.3)/0.25;rv=255;gc=Math.round(204-q*204);bv=Math.round(255*q);}else if(p<0.8){var q=(p-0.55)/0.25;rv=Math.round(255*(1-q));gc=0;bv=Math.round(255*(1-q*0.5));}else{rv=0;gc=0;bv=Math.round(130*(1-(p-0.8)/0.2));}var op=p<0.06?p/0.06:Math.max(0,1-Math.pow((p-0.06)/0.94,0.4));var cr=Math.max(1,Math.round(sz*persp*(1-p*0.5)));elems.push(React.createElement('circle',{key:i,cx:Math.round(x),cy:Math.round(y),r:cr,fill:'rgb('+rv+','+gc+','+bv+')',opacity:Math.round(op*100)/100}));}var go=Math.max(0,1-f/8);if(go>0){elems.push(React.createElement('circle',{key:'g1',cx:cx,cy:cy,r:Math.round(150*go),fill:'white',opacity:Math.round(go*0.85*100)/100}));elems.push(React.createElement('circle',{key:'g2',cx:cx,cy:cy,r:Math.round(70*go),fill:'#aaeeff',opacity:Math.round(go*100)/100}));}return React.createElement('svg',{xmlns:'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg',width:W,height:H,style:{position:'absolute',top:0,left:0}},elems);}
